test_cases.title: persistState writes external state file
test_cases.description: AC-1.1: Run workflow, verify external JSONL file is written with serialized instances
steps: assert at least 1 valid line, content matches serializedInstance

test_cases.title: persistState writes workflow-state-link pointer entry
test_cases.description: AC-1.1: Verify pi.appendEntry called with customType 'workflow-state-link' and shape {runId, path, updatedAt}
steps: verify data shape: { runId: string, path: string, updatedAt: ISO string }

test_cases.title: persistState does NOT write old workflow-state entry
test_cases.description: AC-1.1: Verify the old 'workflow-state' entry type is no longer written
steps: verify appendEntry is NEVER called with 'workflow-state' customType

test_cases.title: reconstructState reads pointer entries and loads instances
test_cases.description: AC-1.2: Append workflow-state-link entries, verify reconstructState loads instances from external files
steps: create new ctx.sessionManager.getEntries() returning the pointer entries
verify status / callCache / trace are restored

test_cases.title: reconstructState skips missing external state file
test_cases.description: AC-1.3: Pointer entry points to non-existent file, verify reconstructState skips and notifies
steps: mock ctx.sessionManager with pointer to non-existent path

test_cases.title: reconstructState skips corrupt JSONL line
test_cases.description: AC-1.3: External file has malformed JSON line, verify reconstructState skips that line and notifies
steps: verify at least 1 valid instance loaded (the malformed line skipped)

test_cases.title: WorkflowStatus includes state_lost as terminal
test_cases.description: AC-1.4: Verify state.ts exports state_lost in WorkflowStatus, ALL_STATUSES, TERMINAL_STATUSES, VALID_TRANSITIONS with empty outgoing
steps: import { WorkflowStatus, ALL_STATUSES, TERMINAL_STATUSES, VALID_TRANSITIONS } from 'state'

test_cases.title: reconstructState ignores old workflow-state entries
test_cases.description: FR-1.5 backward compat (covered by AC-1.3): Old workflow-state entries in session JSONL are silently ignored
steps: verify old entry not loaded as instance

test_cases.title: workflow-run auto mode with confirm=yes runs workflow
test_cases.description: AC-2.1: User presses y in UI confirm, workflow starts
steps: verify ctx.ui.confirm called with title='Run workflow?'

test_cases.title: workflow-run auto mode with confirm=no declines
test_cases.description: AC-2.1: User presses n in UI confirm, workflow does NOT run

test_cases.title: sessionApprovals cache skip confirm on second call
test_cases.description: AC-2.2: First call confirms, second call (same name) does not call confirm
steps: first call: mock confirm=true, verify confirm called
second call: mock confirm and assert it was NEVER called

test_cases.title: session_start rehydrates sessionApprovals from entries
test_cases.description: AC-2.3: Pre-existing workflow-approval-memory entries populate sessionApprovals Set
steps: prepend 2 workflow-approval-memory entries: {workflowName: 'w1', approvedAt: '...'} and {workflowName: 'w2', approvedAt: '...'}
verify confirm NOT called (cache hit from rehydrated memory)

test_cases.title: hasUI=false falls back to sendUserMessage
test_cases.description: AC-2.4: RPC mode (no UI), auto mode uses sendUserMessage, not ctx.ui.confirm

test_cases.title: force mode skips confirm and sets confirmSkipped
test_cases.description: AC-2.5: mode='force' bypasses UI confirm, sets details.confirmSkipped=true

test_cases.title: tmp workflow always confirms, never enters sessionApprovals
test_cases.description: AC-2.6: Tmp workflow (source='tmp') always shows confirm UI, even on second call
steps: first call: mock confirm=true, verify confirm called
second call: mock confirm=true, verify confirm called AGAIN (not cached)

test_cases.title: shared stub ui interface includes confirm and select
test_cases.description: AC-2.7: shared/types/mariozechner/index.d.ts ui interface has confirm/select/input methods
steps: verify ui.confirm signature: (title, message, opts?) => Promise<boolean>
verify ui.select signature: (title, options, opts?) => Promise<string | undefined>
verify ui.input signature: (title, placeholder?, opts?) => Promise<string | undefined>

test_cases.title: SKILL.md contains Verification Patterns section with Pattern A and Pattern B
test_cases.description: AC-3.1: extensions/workflow/skills/workflow-script-format/SKILL.md has the new section
steps: verify contains decision tree or anti-pattern note

test_cases.title: tool-generate promptGuidelines includes verification rule
test_cases.description: AC-3.2: tool-generate.ts promptGuidelines array contains a verification-related rule
steps: verify array contains at least 1 item mentioning 'verifiable' or 'verification'
verify mentions 'self-check' or 'follow-up' (Pattern A or B)

test_cases.title: orchestrator.ts and worker-script.ts not modified for verification
test_cases.description: AC-3.3: git diff shows no changes to orchestrator.ts agent() or worker-script.ts agent() implementations
steps: git diff main -- extensions/workflow/src/orchestrator.ts (only persistState/reconstructState changes allowed)
git diff main -- extensions/workflow/src/worker-script.ts (must be empty)
verify no new fields added to agent() signature

test_cases.title: ExecutionTraceNode verifyStrategy optional and not serialized
test_cases.description: AC-3.4: verifyStrategy exists as optional field on ExecutionTraceNode, but serializeInstance excludes it
steps: assert serialized.trace[0] does NOT have 'verifyStrategy' key (JSON.stringify + parse to verify)

test_cases.title: AgentPool soft warning fires once at 501st call
test_cases.description: AC-4.1: When totalCallCount first > 500, callback fires exactly once
steps: create AgentPool with mock onSoftLimitReached callback
dispatch 500 times (mock fast spawn, no cache hits)
verify callback called once with totalCalls=501
verify callback still called exactly 1 time total

test_cases.title: Soft warning message format
test_cases.description: AC-4.2: sendUserMessage called with exact format string
steps: create AgentPool with onSoftLimitReached that captures the args
verify callback args.budget.usedTokens / .maxTokens are passed through
verify orchestrator-side pi.sendUserMessage called with template '[workflow:${runName}] Reached 500 agent calls. Budget: ${used}/${max} tokens. Consider aborting if this is unintended.'

test_cases.title: Workflow continues after warning (no throw)
test_cases.description: AC-4.3: After warning fires, dispatch still processes
steps: create AgentPool with onSoftLimitReached that throws (verify no impact)
catch any thrown error from callback
verify 502nd dispatch still processes (callback error isolated by try/catch in impl)

test_cases.title: Cache hit does not increment totalCallCount
test_cases.description: AC-4.4: totalCallCount only increments on real spawn, not cache hit
steps: create AgentPool with mock dispatch that simulates cache hit (same callId)
call dispatch 5 times with same callId

test_cases.title: Per-WorkflowPool counter is independent
test_cases.description: AC-4.5: Each AgentPool instance has its own counter

test_cases.title: AgentPoolOptions.onSoftLimitReached callback injection
test_cases.description: AC-4.6: AgentPool constructor accepts onSoftLimitReached callback, AgentPool does NOT hold ExtensionAPI ref
steps: verify AgentPoolOptions has onSoftLimitReached: (info: {runName, totalCalls, budget}) => void field
verify AgentPool instance does NOT have a 'pi' property (only 'onSoftLimitReached' ref)
verify orchestrator code creates AgentPool with onSoftLimitReached: ({...}) => this.pi.sendUserMessage(...)

test_cases.title: docs/workflow-research/07-下一步行动与决策.md exists with required sections
test_cases.description: AC-5.1: Decision summary doc exists with 5 decision summaries, link to spec, timeline, out-of-scope
steps: verify file exists: docs/workflow-research/07-下一步行动与决策.md
verify contains 5 decision summaries (1-2 sentences each)
verify contains 'Out-of-scope' list with 4 items (nested workflow, 硬 maxAgents, auto/force 重命名, 真正 GC)
verify contains 'Why no ADR' or equivalent section

test_cases.title: CONTEXT.md includes 4 new workflow terms
test_cases.description: AC-5.2: Phase 1 update done; verify terms present
steps: verify file CONTEXT.md contains 'External State Pointer'

test_cases.title: No new ADR created for this spec
test_cases.description: AC-5.3: docs/adr/ has no new file from this phase
steps: verify no file with date prefix from this work (no 2026-06-04-* ADR)

test_cases.title: Test suite has at least 13 new tests
test_cases.description: AC-6.1: Count new tests added across all test files
steps: count new test names (containing 'state_lost' or 'external' or 'confirm' or 'soft' or 'verification')

test_cases.title: All tests pass
test_cases.description: AC-6.2: Existing 140 + new tests all pass

test_cases.title: Typecheck passes for all packages
test_cases.description: AC-6.3: After stub update, full repo typecheck passes
steps: verify no TS errors in any package
